attacking_style: Opportunistic solo moves exploiting hesitation, often attacking same climb multiple times to test opposition. Capable of long-range efforts, winning from final climb with full lap remaining.
team_tactics: Operates with autonomy in breakaways rather than team-supported efforts. Positions himself in early moves on flat stages and climbs alike, adapting role beyond pure TT specialist.
terrain_preference: Time trials (sub-16min ITT performance) and selective climbs where he can distance pursuers on descent/flat sections. Flat stages for breakaway positioning, not pure sprint leadout.
vulnerability: Can be dropped on climbs initially but compensates with tactical re-attacks. Early starters in time trials gain minimal advantage, suggesting course/weather conditions matter significantly.
key_patterns: Multiple attacks on same climb to exhaust opposition, evidenced twice in Giro stage win
Consecutive days in breakaways shows opportunistic animation across multi-day races (Guangxi, Romandie)
Holds time trial hot seat positions for extended periods through exceptional pacing ability
Wins solo by exploiting peloton hesitation after sustained efforts, not pure power surges
form_trajectory: positive: 2022 TT performance (5th overall, sub-16min) and 2020 stage win demonstrate sustained ability to compete at WorldTour level beyond pure TT specialist role
